route.name: Horn of the Metolius
route.description:
This is a Dirty Freehub "5 Star" route. Meaing it meets our standards for being a great route to ride! For more information on this route and many others, go to www.DirtyFreehub.com/horn-metolius

Map Legend:
Red = paved roads
Brown = gravel / dirt roads or double track
Blue = single track

-------------------------------------------------------------
Share with Integrity. Please read before sharing: DirtyFreehub.com/integrity
